groups.T1A: Purpose and permissible use; license grant; basic terms; interference; RACES; phonetics; frequency coordinator; beacon
groups.T1B: Frequency allocations; emission modes; spectrum sharing; band edges; contacting the ISS; power output
groups.T1C: Licensing: classes, call sign systems, FCC jurisdiction, license database, term/renewal/grace period; international communications
groups.T1D: Authorized and prohibited transmissions; sale of equipment
groups.T1E: Control operator: eligibility, designating, privileges, duties, location; control point; control types
groups.T1F: Station identification; repeaters; third-party communications; club stations; FCC inspection
groups.T2A: Station operation: choosing a frequency, calling another station, test transmissions; band plans
groups.T2B: VHF/UHF operating: FM repeater, simplex, reverse splits; CTCSS/DTMF; DMR; Q signals
groups.T2C: Public service: emergency operations, RACES/ARES, net and traffic procedures, phonetics in message handling
groups.T3A: Radio wave characteristics: signal travel, fading, multipath, polarization, wavelength vs absorption; antenna orientation
groups.T3B: Electromagnetic wave properties: wavelength vs frequency; UHF/VHF/HF definitions
groups.T3C: Propagation modes: sporadic E, meteor scatter, auroral, tropospheric ducting, F region skip, line of sight
groups.T4A: Station setup: microphone, RF power meter, power source, computer, digital gear, SWR meter; RF grounding; mobile install
groups.T4B: Operating controls: tuning, filters, squelch, AGC, memory channels, noise blanker, mic gain, RIT, bandwidth, scanning; DMR code plugs
groups.T5A: Current and voltage: terminology and units, conductors and insulators, AC/DC
groups.T5B: Math for electronics: unit conversion, decibels
groups.T5C: Capacitance and inductance; RF definition and units; impedance; calculating power
groups.T5D: Ohm's Law; series and parallel circuits
groups.T6A: Fixed and variable resistors; capacitors; inductors; fuses; switches; batteries
groups.T6D: Component functions: rectifiers, relays, voltage regulators, meters, indicators, ICs, transformers; resonant circuits; shielding
groups.T7A: Station equipment: receivers, transceivers, amplifiers, preamps, transverters; sensitivity, selectivity, mixers, oscillators, PTT, VFO, modulation
groups.T7B: Transmitter/receiver problems: overload, overdrive, distortion, interference, RF feedback
groups.T7C: Antenna/feed line measurement: SWR, high-SWR effects, feed line failures, coax characteristics, dummy loads
groups.T7D: Test instruments: voltmeter, ammeter, ohmmeter; soldering
groups.T8A: FM and SSB characteristics; bandwidth of CW/SSB/FM/fast-scan TV; choosing emission type
groups.T8B: Amateur satellites: Doppler shift, orbits, protocols, mode selection, power, telemetry, tracking, LEO
groups.T8C: Operating activities: direction finding, contests, internet linking, grid locators
groups.T8D: Non-voice/digital: NTSC, CW, packet, PSK, APRS, error detection, DMR, WSJT, Broadband-Hamnet
groups.T9A: Antennas: polarization, gain, beam antennas, loading, portable/mobile antennas, resonant length vs frequency, dipole pattern
groups.T9B: Feed lines: types, attenuation, SWR concepts, antenna tuners, RF connectors
groups.T0A: Power circuit hazards: voltages, fuses/breakers, grounding, code compliance, lightning, battery safety
groups.T0B: Antenna safety: tower safety and grounding, installing antennas, supports
groups.T0C: RF hazards: exposure, proximity, safe power levels, radiation types, duty cycle
